content.text: Frame generation inserts interpolated frames between rendered frames, effectively doubling your frame rate.
DLSS-G requires an NVIDIA RTX 40-series or newer GPU.

content.help: Toggle frame generation on or off. Takes effect immediately. (Default: On)
Caps frame rate to your monitor's refresh rate when VSync is disabled. Prevents tearing. Takes effect immediately. (Default: On)
FSR3 works on all GPUs. DLSS-G requires RTX 40+. Changing this requires a game restart. (Default: DLSS-G)
